title: Eternal MC
description: Welcome to Eternal MC the mod Pack ment to last forever
body: welcome to eternal MC the only final mod pack you'll need filled with magic, New dimensions new ways to travel new universes and planets to explore and find epic weapons to help you conquer this world wheeled powerful firearms explored a complete overhaul of all the vanilla biomes and dimensions with more content to explore and a complete overhaul of vanilla Minecraft structures and biomes it has everything you will ever need for your final mod pack or at least until the two week Minecraft phase is done with your friends.
